assertions.assertion: Code uses ISessionManagementService with QuerySessionsAsync and CountRequested = 10 for the first page
assertions.rationale: QuerySessionsAsync with CountRequested = 10 for first page.

assertions.assertion: Code uses ResultsToken from the first query result to fetch the next page
assertions.rationale: Next page uses ResultsToken from previous result.

assertions.assertion: Code uses RemoveSessionsAsync with RevokeConsents = false to preserve consent grants
Code sets SendBackchannelLogoutNotification = true (explicitly or by relying on the default) in RemoveSessionsContext
Response mentions preferring GetSessionsAsync over QuerySessionsAsync for simple session listing
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section explains preferring GetSessionsAsync for simple listing.
